descriptions.en: Meet Caby — your shy little homebody with cozy vibes!
descriptions.zh-Hans: 卡比来啦——一只爱宅家又很治愈的小可爱！

descriptions.en: Cute pumpkins, silly ghosts, funny monsters! 👻🎃 Collect them all!
descriptions.zh-Hans: 可爱的南瓜、调皮的小幽灵、搞怪的小怪兽 👻🎃 全部收集带回家！

descriptions.en: Fill your screens with Santa and his friends!
descriptions.zh-Hans: 与圣诞老人和他的小伙伴们度过一个温暖的圣诞节吧！

descriptions.en: Get these panda stickers and infect your friends with cuteness!
descriptions.zh-Hans: 一只可爱萌萌的小熊猫来了，快快把它放进你的手机吧！

descriptions.en: Adopt the kitty and puppy to add more cuteness in your daily chat!
descriptions.zh-Hans: 小喵和小汪对人类世界充满了好奇，等着你在 JusTalk 上领养她们！

descriptions.en: Happy Year of the Rat! Wish you luck and prosperity.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 可爱的吉利鼠祝大家大吉大利，万事如意。

descriptions.en: Turn famous artworks into funny stickers.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 用世界名画给你的日常聊天加点戏。

descriptions.en: Add some fun to your day with these animated Emojis.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 超级好用的 Emoji 表情终于动起来了！
